title: Create PopeBot build packet dispatch integration module TypeScript
job:
Create a new file plugins/dev-department/src/worker/buildPacket.ts

This module handles dispatching a phase build to PopeBot. It should:

1. Import types from ./types
2. Export an interface BuildPacketConfig with: popebotUrl, apiKey, targetRepo, environment
3. Export a function assembleBuildPacket(phase, spec, prd, config) that creates a structured build packet string from phase data
4. Export an async function dispatchToPopeBot(packet, config) that:
   - POSTs to config.popebotUrl/api/create-agent-job
   - With x-api-key header
   - With {job: packet} body
   - Returns {agentJobId, branch, title} on success
   - Returns {error: string} on failure

Keep it simple — this is the integration point. Commit.
